textByHashes.7c89b524821cebc27ca948997faf50f3dd3f95e2: Hey guy! Always nice to see a fresh face!
textByHashes.a7464aebf00197151edbc1cfc8b458e773d32cc9: That's right, guy! Ain't nobody better at fishing round here than me! That's for sure!
textByHashes.ceac8ad15c1ea7720c92dec7d1e50cbc2a34dd0a: Sorry guy! This is my lucky spot!
textByHashes.54a73e36cbba698eeb71a2f386b2d3af4cb66f5a: Why would I help you? I wanna stay the best! I'm not givin' away my secrets like old Grampa Jack does!
textByHashes.02cba21fd4c29d70cd9b865806610db9759583d8: You really have no clue do you! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
